headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) After The Recent Pullback
summary: Wondering if Packaging Corporation of America at around US$204 a share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price? This article breaks down what the current valuation really says about the stock. The share price has pulled back recently, with a 3.7% decline over the last week and a 9.6% decline over the last month, even though the 1 year return sits at 14.2% and the 5 year return at 72.0%. Recent coverage has focused on how the stock's longer term...
